title: Silence From The Grave suppresses opponent creature effects on your turn

card.rawText: Discard 1 magic card to the cemetery to play this card. Destroy all magic cards on the field. For 2 turn cycles, your opponent cannot play magic cards and their creature effects are negated during your turn. The opponent may still respond with a valid Lightning card before this card resolves.

effect.value: Opponent creature effects negated only during activating player turns

plan.title: Silence From The Grave suppresses opponent creature effects on your turn
plan.summary: Resolve Silence From The Grave and verify its turn-conditional opponent creature suppression instance is applied.

notes: Keep Health Potion in hand for Silence's cost.
Put ordinary creatures on both fields so opponent creature suppression has a visible target scope.

steps: Player 1 plays Silence From The Grave.
Resolve the chain and inspect the applied Silence suppression effect.

expectedAssertions.label: Opponent Magic lock also applied from same resolved source

manualVerification: Confirm suppression is active during the Silence controller's turns and not during the opponent's turns.
riskNotes: Creatures that explicitly ignore Magic may ignore this suppression unless they entered during the replacement suppression window.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
